catalogData.name: Quintessence
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Infuse Mana
powers.raw: Infuse Mana (Trait): +Force/2 on Health spell Drain tests

powers.name: Sustain Spell
powers.raw: Sustain Spell (No Action, Sustained): Sustain one Health spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
powers.text: Sustain one Health spell for you. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

evolvedPowers.name: Banishing Resistance
evolvedPowers.raw: Banishing Resistance (Trait): Double Force vs. Negate

evolvedPowers.name: Preserve Life
evolvedPowers.raw: Preserve Life (Complex Action): Cast Treat at Force x 2, but can only remove Dying status
evolvedPowers.text: Cast Treat at Force x 2, but can only remove Dying status

evolvedPowers.name: Primary Spell
evolvedPowers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action): Cast Mindlink at Force

elementalFormulaePower.name: Elemental Formulae
elementalFormulaePower.raw: Elemental Formulae (Complex Action, Sustained): 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.
elementalFormulaePower.text: 1 SpellType alchemical preparation does not count against limit. Spell Force must be ≤ elemental's Force.

greatFormPowers.name: Poisonous
greatFormPowers.raw: Poisonous (Trait): When melee attack hits, Force/2 toxin causes Liability on all tests, excluding resistance tests. Resist: WIL+BOD
greatFormPowers.text: When melee attack hits, Force/2 toxin causes Liability on all tests, excluding resistance tests. Resist: WIL+BOD

greatFormPowers.name: Primary Spell
greatFormPowers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action): Cast Antidote, Cure Disease, or Treat at Force
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Antidote, Cure Disease, or Treat at Force
